scripts.preinstall: node -e "['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => require('fs').existsSync(f) && require('fs').unlinkSync(f)); if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
